name: Vegetarian Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon cumin powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stockpot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat, cook onion, celery, bell pepper, and garlic in red wine for 10 minutes. Add chiles and tomatoes and cook 3 minutes.
2. Add beans, cumin, cilantro, chili powder, oregano, the water, and tomato paste. Raise heat to high, bring to a boil, then lower heat to medium. Cover pot and cook until chili is thick (45 minutes to 1 hour).
3. Taste for seasoning, add salt substitute if needed, and serve hot.
Makes 8 to 10 cups.
